 -Justifications : zntco|Type|Tiago, Tiago|SubClassOf|Agent, zntco|hasCapability|suazt, suazt|isCapabilityOf|zntco, zntco|hasComponent|uurelz, uurelz|Type|TwoFingerClaw, TwoFingerClaw|SubClassOf|Gripper, as|Type|Suitcase, Suitcase|SubClassOf|Object, as|hasDisposition|jhnmz, jhnmz|isDispositionOf|as, as|hasPart|tvnhe, tvnhe|Type|Handle, Handle|SubClassOf|GraspablePart, as|isReachableBy|zntco, uurelz|Type|Gripper, Gripper|SubClassOf|EndEffector, zntco|hasComponent|uurelz, uurelz|hasOpeningWidth|integer#55, as|hasHoldingPartWidth|integer#42, greaterThan(integer#55,integer#42) 
 -Rules : Agent(?a), hasCapability(?a, ?c), GraspingCapability(?c), Object(?o), hasDisposition(?o, ?d), GraspableDisposition(?d), isReachableBy(?o,?a), EndEffector(?g), hasComponent(?a,?g), hasOpeningWidth(?g,?w1), hasHoldingPartWidth(?o,?w2), greaterThan(?w1,?w2) -> canGrasp(?a, ?o)
	GraspingCapability|EquivalentTo|(isCapabilityOf some (hasComponent some Gripper)
	GraspableDisposition|EquivalentTo|isDispositionOf some (hasPart some GraspablePart)
answers.answer: the Tiago robot can grasp the suitcase because it has a grasping capability based on its two-finger claw component, which is an end effector with an opening width greater than the holding part width of the suitcase. The suitcase is reachable by the robot and has a disposition that allows for grasping, making it possible for the Tiago to pick up the suitcase.
